retry_reason: release_firmware is a put that never fails; retrying would cause double-release of the same firmware object.
contract_summary: Releases all firmware references held in test_fw_config->reqs array via release_firmware, which decrements the firmware's kref. Also frees the associated fw_buf strings and vfrees the reqs array itself. After this call, the test_fw_config->reqs pointer is set to NULL and should not be dereferenced. This is a cleanup wrapper that ensures all acquired firmware references are properly released before reinitializing or destroying the test configuration. Caller must ensure that no concurrent accesses to the firmware objects occur after this call.
